settings.heading: Premium storefront framework for product discovery and support clarity
settings.copy: Structured to balance merchandising, product education, and support pathways without locking in final campaign copy.
settings.panel_copy: This hero supports future visual polish, campaign modules, and stronger product-family storytelling without changing the underlying information architecture.

settings.heading: Collection architecture for key product families
settings.copy: Supports category-led merchandising today and richer collection storytelling in later phases.

settings.title: Hubs and adapters
settings.copy: Reserved for the primary collection entry point and category positioning.

settings.title: Docking stations
settings.copy: Reserved for workspace and multi-device docking solutions.

settings.title: Chargers and power
settings.copy: Reserved for charging, power delivery, and portable power modules.

settings.title: Cables and accessories
settings.copy: Reserved for supporting accessories and add-on browsing paths.

settings.heading: Homepage modules that can grow into a premium storytelling system
settings.copy: These cards are placeholders for future campaign, trust, and product-story layers while keeping the layout reviewable now.

settings.title: Feature storytelling band
settings.copy: Reserved for modular story panels that combine product utility and technical clarity.

settings.title: Comparison and buying guidance
settings.copy: Reserved for compare-entry points and product-family differentiation.

settings.title: Support and compatibility pathways
settings.copy: Reserved for downloads, manuals, compatibility, and troubleshooting discovery.

settings.heading: Support routes are visible from the first page
settings.copy: This module establishes the support center as part of the primary customer journey, not a disconnected utility area.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Entry point for drivers, firmware, and product resources.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Entry point for setup guides and product documentation.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Entry point for device, platform, and workflow compatibility guidance.

settings.heading: Editorial and education framework
settings.copy: Supports future journal content, product education, and evergreen guidance without requiring that content to exist yet.

settings.heading: A framework ready for deeper product and support implementation
settings.copy: The next layer can focus on richer merchandising, structured support data, and visual polish without changing the core architecture.
